claims.summary: The active semantic vector is 48D with a deterministic fixed projection basis.
claims.disposition: Verify the canonical dimensions and fixed-seed basis initialization in current codec source.

claims.summary: Projection columns must remain finite, normalized, and non-dead.
claims.disposition: Verify the projection basis health audit and threshold-margin regressions.

claims.summary: Production f32 accumulation drift needs an explicit higher-precision reference.
claims.disposition: Verify the deterministic f32-versus-f64 precision audit and bounded error result.

claims.summary: Automatic projection correction or a new live basis would change codec behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold any live basis, gain, dimensional, or transport change behind exact Mike/operator approval.
